summary: A clip from a KJCT News segment labeled The 10. An anchor speaks at a studio desk, then the frame shows a booking-style photograph overlaid on street footage, with a NEW TONIGHT label and a lower-third reading ICE ANNOUNCE RECENT ARREST IN GRAND JUNCTION.

script.scene: An anchor speaks at a studio desk; The 10 graphic and KJCT News logo are visible.
A booking-style photograph is overlaid on street footage; lower-third reads ICE ANNOUNCE RECENT ARREST IN GRAND JUNCTION.
The booking photo and street footage continue; NEW TONIGHT label visible.
